# Cloud Run deploy trigger

Update this file only when intentionally triggering the Deploy to Cloud Run workflow from an external agent.

Requested by: ChatGPT AWS cost inventory advisor
Purpose: Trigger Deploy to Cloud Run after separating MCP_AUTH_TOKEN secret removal from deploy.
